options.vulkanimprovement.meshTerrainRen: Replaces vanilla solid and cutout terrain with the mesh-shader path. Requires Vulkan and is off by default while visible work-queue draws are validation gated.
options.vulkanimprovement.terrainCapture: Mirrors vanilla terrain into VIM GPU data without replacing visible terrain. Heavy diagnostic mode.
options.vulkanimprovement.meshTranslucen: Routes translucent terrain through the mesh-shader path. Requires Mesh Terrain. Disabled by default until water ordering matches vanilla.
options.vulkanimprovement.meshletFrustum: Enables shader-side meshlet frustum culling. Requires Mesh Terrain. Leave off while checking for edge-of-screen chunk holes.
options.vulkanimprovement.strictMeshTerr: Keeps mesh terrain replacement in strict mode for diagnostics. Disable while investigating vanilla fallback behavior.
options.vulkanimprovement.drawAllCapture: Draws all captured solid and cutout mesh terrain instead of the visible-list subset. Requires Mesh Terrain. Heavy diagnostic mode.
options.vulkanimprovement.vanillaChunkVi: Applies vanilla chunk-section fade to mesh terrain. Requires Mesh Terrain.
options.vulkanimprovement.terrainFragmen: Applies Vulkan fragment shading rate to terrain. Requires Mesh Terrain and GPU support.
Requested Vulkan fragment shading-rate tile size for terrain. The renderer clamps this to device limits.
Uses Vulkan present-id and present-wait pacing when the device supports them.
options.vulkanimprovement.waitIdleBefore: Waits for the Vulkan device to idle before terrain uploads. Heavy validation mode.
options.vulkanimprovement.allowCpuVisibl: Allows the legacy CPU visible-meshlet-list fallback when work-queue upload is unavailable.
options.vulkanimprovement.gpuGeneratedMe: Uses experimental GPU-generated mesh-task indirect commands. Off by default until async synchronization is validated.
options.vulkanimprovement.dumpCapabiliti: Logs Vulkan Improvement capability and runtime-profile JSON when the Vulkan device is captured.
options.vulkanimprovement.requireVulkanB: Forbids OpenGL fallback after Vulkan backend creation fails or is not selected. Debug/development option.
options.vulkanimprovement.validationDesc: Validation mode that disables the descriptor-heap requirement. Applies to Vulkan device selection.
options.vulkanimprovement.initialSection: Initial GPU section-storage capacity for captured terrain.
options.vulkanimprovement.initialMeshlet: Initial GPU meshlet-storage capacity for captured terrain.
options.vulkanimprovement.initialVertexP: Initial GPU terrain vertex-payload buffer size.
options.vulkanimprovement.initialIndexPa: Initial GPU terrain index-payload buffer size.
options.vulkanimprovement.terrainMirrorS: Delay before mirrored terrain is treated as stable after capture churn.
